title: Kingfisher Disposable Spirit Glasses, Clear Plastic, Pack of 8
features: PACK CONTENTS: Set of 8 clear plastic spirit glasses, perfect for parties and events
CAPACITY: Each glass features measurement markings and holds the ideal serving size for spirits
PRACTICAL DESIGN: Sturdy construction ensures glasses remain stable during use whilst being lightweight
CONVENIENT SOLUTION: Eliminates washing up and ideal for outdoor events, parties, and large gatherings
DIMENSIONS: These disposable glasses are sized appropriately for standard spirit measures and mixers
description: Elevate your entertaining with these versatile clear plastic spirit glasses. Perfect for parties, events, or casual gatherings, this pack of 8 disposable glasses offers convenience without compromising on style. Each glass features measurement markings for precise serving portions, making them ideal for spirits, cocktails, or other beverages. The durable plastic construction ensures these glasses can handle your celebration whilst remaining lightweight and practical. Their crystal-clear appearance provides an elegant look that's suitable for any occasion. The glasses are designed with a stable base to prevent tipping, and their comfortable shape makes them easy to hold. Whether you're hosting a large party or simply need backup glassware, these spirit glasses offer a practical solution for serving drinks with confidence. No need to worry about breakages or washing up - simply dispose of them after use.
